title: Neogaillonia pulchella
taxonomy: Neogaillonia pulchella is a genus of flowering plants in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Madagascar, and its classification places it within the order Gentianales. Further classification includes the family Rubiaceae, subfamily Ixoroideae, and tribe Ixoreae. The genus Neogaillonia pulchella is closely related to Gaillonia and other genera within the Rubiaceae family. Neogaillonia pulchella is a relatively rare and understudied species within the flowering plant kingdom.
